title: NEIAFMR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 35 Professor, Senior Assistant and More Posts
org: North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda & Folk Medicine Research (NEIAFMR)
shortInfo: North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda & Folk Medicine Research (NEIAFMR) Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website www.neiafmr.org.in. A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the NEIAFMR Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: NEIAFMR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 35 Professor, Senior Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda & Folk Medicine Research (NEIAFMR)
basic_details.short_information: North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda & Folk Medicine Research (NEIAFMR) Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website www.neiafmr.org.in. A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the NEIAFMR Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: 55 years for Direct Recruitment, 56 years for Deputation
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years for Direct Recruitment. Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for Deputation. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate, MBBS, MD, MS, M.Sc, M.pharma
qualification.details: Professor: Post Graduate Degree in Ayurveda in the concerned subject recognized under IMCС Act, 1970/NCISM Act, 2020. Associate Professor: PG qualification in Ayurveda in the concerned subject recognized under IMCC Act, 1970/NCISM Act, 2020. Associate Professor: Post Graduate Degree in Ayurveda in the concerned subject recognized under the IMCC Act, 1970/NCISM Act, 2020. Assistant Professor: PG Degree in Ayurveda in the concerned subject recognized under IMCC Act, 1970/NCISM Act, 2020. Pathologist: MBBS degree from a recognized University. Post Graduate degree in the concerned Pediatrician: MBBS degree froma recognized University. Post Graduate degree in the concerned Obstetrician and Gynecologist: MBBS degree from a recognized University. Anesthesiologist: MBBS degree from a recognized University Ophthalmologist: MBBS degree from a recognized University Radiologist: MBBS degree from a recognized University. Pharmacognosist: Post Graduate Degree in Botany/Pharmacology/ M. Pharma (Pharmacognosy) from a recognized University Ethnobotanist: Post Graduate Degree in Botany/ Ethnobotany/ Medicinal Plants or MD in Dravyaguna from a recognized university. Herbarium Curator/Museum Curator: (Rs. 56,100- 1,77,500) Resident Medical Officer: (Rs. 56,100- 1,77,500) Senior Assistant: (Rs. 25,500-81,100) Panchakarma Assistant: (Rs. 25,500-81,100)

vacancy_details.Post Name: Associate Professor (Ayurveda) [Agada Tantra; Dravyaguna; Kaumarabhritya; Kriya Sharir; Samhita & Siddhanta; Roganidan; Swasthavritta and Yoga]
Associate Professor (Ayurveda) [Kayachikitsa-UR; Panchakarma-UR; Prasuti Tantra Stri Roga-UR; Rachna Sharir-OBC; Rasa Shastra-UR; Shalakya-UR; Shalya-SC]

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIAFMR Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.neiafmr.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NEIAFMR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the NEIAFMR Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NEIAFMR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 35 vacancies announced for various posts in the North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda & Folk Medicine Research.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for NEIAFMR Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 25,500 to Rs. 2,15,900 per month, depending on the post and level.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for direct recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for direct recruitment is 55 years.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for deputation posts?
faq.answer: Yes, the age limit for deputation posts is up to 56 years.

faq.question: Q7. What are the application fees for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: For Group A posts, the fee is Rs. 1,500, and for Group C posts, it is Rs. 500 for General/OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NEIAFMR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications followed by a test or interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of NEIAFMR, which is www.neiafmr.org.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of NEIAFMR?
faq.answer: NEIAFMR is located in Pasighat, Arunachal Pradesh, with the pincode 791102.
